description_long: This is a large, rectangular wooden desk or cabinet with a rich brown finish and a modern, functional design. On one side, it features two drawers with visible handles, providing enclosed storage space, while the other side has open shelving supported by a metal pole, suitable for books, electronics, or display items. The top surface is broad and flat, ideal for use as a workspace or for placing larger objects. The structure is supported by a solid base, and the open shelving area includes multiple horizontal and vertical dividers for organization. The materials appear to be primarily wood or wood laminate, with some metal elements for structural support. The overall appearance is sturdy and practical, making it suitable for urban environments such as offices, garages, or public spaces.
description: A large, brown wooden desk or cabinet with drawers, open shelves, and a broad flat top, featuring both enclosed and open storage areas. Its modern design includes metal support and multiple compartments for organization.
description_view_0: Front view showing two drawers with handles on the left and open shelving with a metal support on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the cabinet and the open shelving structure, with the drawers not visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the open shelving area and the solid back panel, with the drawers hidden from sight.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the solid side panel and the overall length of the cabinet, with no drawers or shelves visible.
